description:
Launch readiness audit for hx-tabs. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-tab** AND **hx-tab-panel** (`hx-tabs/hx-tab.ts`, `hx-tabs/hx-tab-panel.ts`). These are registered custom elements that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip them.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core audit on ALL THREE: hx-tabs, hx-tab, hx-tab-panel. Verify ARIA roles (tablist/tab/tabpanel pattern per WAI-ARIA APG), keyboard navigation (Arrow keys, Home, End), aria-selected, aria-controls/aria-labelledby linkage. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update doc page using the standard template. All 12 sections filled. Must document hx-tab and hx-tab-panel APIs too.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify import works in isolation and exports ALL THREE elements.
4. **Existing tests pass** — Run `npm run verify`. Do NOT run vitest directly.

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never add `= null` to `@query` fields — use `!` assertion
- C-PATTERN-02: Never call `setAttribute()` in constructor — use `connectedCallback()`
- C-PATTERN-06: Register event listeners BEFORE any `await` calls

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tabs/` (includes hx-tab.ts, hx-tab-panel.ts)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-tabs.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations (parent AND both sub-components)
- Doc page complete per template (all sub-component APIs documented)
- Individual import works in standalone HTML (all three elements render)
- `npm run verify` passes
title: LAUNCH READY: hx-tabs
